message.content:
Explore the K3RN platform app pages to understand what functional pages exist and what they do. Look at:
1. src/app/page.tsx (landing page)
2. src/app/capture/page.tsx (capture page)
3. src/app/workspace/page.tsx (workspace/dossiers page)
4. src/app/workspace/[id]/page.tsx (individual project page)
5. src/app/logo-generator/ (logo generator)
6. src/app/canonical-demo/ (canonical demo)
7. Any other pages under src/app/

For each, give me a brief description of what it does and its current UI layout. Also check src/components/ for major component patterns used across the app.

content.text: I'll explore the K3RN platform app pages and components systematically. Let me start by examining the app pages and then the components.
Now let me read the remaining pages and examine key component patterns:

content.text: Let me check a few more important components to complete the picture:

Perfect! I now have comprehensive coverage. Let me compile the findings into a detailed report.

## K3RN Platform App Pages and Component Overview

Based on my exploration of the codebase, here's a comprehensive breakdown of the K3RN platform's functional pages and major component patterns:

### APP PAGES

#### 1. **Landing Page** (`src/app/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Public marketing/product showcase page
- **UI Layout**: Full-page scroll with sections stacked vertically
  - Hero section with main headline and CTA
  - Trusted By section (partner/client logos)
  - Process Pipeline visualization
  - Bento Grid (feature highlights)
  - Impact Metrics dashboard
  - Executive Quote testimony
  - Pricing/Membership section
  - Protocol FAQ
  - Footer
- **Components**: Composed entirely of landing-specific components (`Hero`, `BentoGrid`, `TrustedBy`, `ImpactMetrics`, etc.)
- **Design**: Bold hero, light typography, selection color: `#F75105/30` (orange brand accent)

#### 2. **Capture Page** (`src/app/capture/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Main idea input/analysis entry point for authenticated users
- **UI Layout**: Centered card-based design with two modes
  - **INPUT MODE**: 
    - Large hero heading (6-7xl text)
    - Central input card with rounded 24px corners
    - Textarea for idea description
    - Attachment preview area (files & links with tags)
    - Action toolbar: File attachment, Link addition (in popover), Voice input, Submit button
    - Orange submit button with arrow icon and glow effect
  - **ANALYZING MODE**: Transitions to AnalysisResults component showing real-time analysis progress
- **Features**: 
  - Keyboard shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl + Enter) for submit
  - Speech recognition integration
  - Multiple input types: text, files, links
  - Localized (uses language store)
- **Design Language**: Dark background, high contrast white text, orange accents

#### 3. **Workspace/Dossiers Page** (`src/app/workspace/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Project dashboard displaying all user's analysis results (called "Dossiers")
- **UI Layout**: Grid-based card layout with floating dock controls
  - Header with "Dossiers" title and active project count
  - Responsive grid (1 col mobile → 4 cols desktop)
  - ProCard components for each project
  - Floating dock at bottom with controls
- **Features**:
  - View mode toggle (Grid/List)
  - Search functionality (expandable search in dock)
  - Filter by decision type (ALL, GO, EXPLORE, PARK, KILL)
  - Sort options (by Date or Score)
  - Settings dialog for individual projects (rename, customize color/description)
  - "New Project" card linking to capture page
  - Mock data with 5 sample projects if no stored projects
- **Design**: Card-based with decision color accents, minimal borders

#### 4. **Project Details/Workspace Page** (`src/app/workspace/[id]/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Individual project deep-work environment with multi-panel layout
- **UI Layout**: Three-column workspace
  - **Left Panel**: Dossier Panel (source materials, research data, analysis quality indicator)
  - **Center**: Canvas Board (collaborative note/sketch area with sticky notes and toolbar)
  - **Right Panel**: Expert Chat (AI experts providing feedback)
- **Features**:
  - Draggable sticky notes on canvas (uses Framer Motion)
  - Floating toolbar for canvas tools (select, note, text, shape, pan)
  - Chat interface with expert personas (Ava, Marcus)
  - Analysis quality progress indicator
  - Material file browser
- **Design**: Dark workspace theme (#22242B, #2F323A, #1a1c22), minimal decorations

#### 5. **Logo Generator** (`src/app/logo-generator/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Parametric K-like glyph (letter/symbol) design editor
- **UI Layout**: Split design
  - **Left Panel**: Controls for global glyph properties and piece-specific adjustments
  - **Right Panel**: Live preview canvas with grid background
  - Header with export button and canonical mode indicator
- **Features**:
  - SVG export functionality
  - Parametric controls (shape, stroke, color, rotation)
  - Grid-based canvas
  - Strict canonical design system adherence
- **Design**: Functional, monospace header, no blur/gradients, high contrast

#### 6. **Canonical Demo Page** (`src/app/canonical-demo/page.tsx`)
- **Purpose**: Design system reference/demo page showcasing K3RN.LABS UI tokens
- **UI Layout**: Multi-section informational layout
  - Functional panel section
  - Standard button states (default, hover, active, disabled)
  - Typography hierarchy (H1, H2, Body, Caption)
  - Grid and spacing demonstration
  - Color/surface tokens showcase
- **Features**: Static documentation of design tokens
- **Design**: Demonstrates: background color, surface layers, text hierarchy, border colors, no decorative effects

---

### MAJOR COMPONENT PATTERNS

#### **Header Components**
- **SiteHeader** (`src/components/layout/site-header.tsx`): 
  - Sticky, dark with backdrop blur
  - Two variants: `"public"` (landing page) and `"app"` (app pages)
  - Public variant: navigation links + "Commencer" CTA button
  - App variant: nav (Capture, Dossiers) + language selector + user nav
  - Logo hover animation (rotation)

#### **Card Components**
- **ProCard** (`src/components/workspace/pro-card.tsx`):
  - Project card with 4:3 aspect ratio
  - Top color accent band (reflects decision type)
  - Folder icon, score (/100), title, description, date, decision badge
  - Settings button on hover
  - Color mapping: GO=green (#10B981), EXPLORE=amber, PARK=gray, KILL=red

#### **Analysis Results Component**
- **AnalysisResults** (`src/components/capture/analysis-results.tsx`):
  - Two-step process: LOADING (with animated axis analysis) → RESULTS
  - Sidebar: Global score (large 7xl), decision badge, confidence level
  - Main content: Decision summary, 6 axis breakdowns with scores, risks, growth levers
  - Actions: New analysis, enrichment (if available), go to dossiers, enter lab
  - Supports demo mode fallback if API quota exceeded
  - Animated progress bar and console logs during analysis

#### **Workspace Components**
- **FloatingDock** (`src/components/workspace/floating-dock.tsx`):
  - Fixed bottom-center floating control panel
  - View toggles (grid/list), filters (decision types with colored styling), sort, search (expandable), new project button
  - Backdrop blur, well-designed spacing

- **DossierPanel** (`src/components/workspace/dossier-panel.tsx`):
  - Left sidebar, width 288px
  - Source Materials section: text files, voice memos
  - Research Data section: PDFs, images with file size metadata
  - Footer: Analysis Quality progress bar with gradient and glow

- **ExpertChat** (`src/components/workspace/expert-chat.tsx`):
  - Right sidebar, width 384px
  - Expert personas with initials (Ava, Marcus) with role labels
  - Chat history view with time separators
  - Input area with send button
  - Live indicator (pulsing orange dot)

- **CanvasBoard** (`src/components/workspace/canvas-board.tsx`):
  - Center main area with dark theme and grid pattern background
  - Draggable sticky notes with Framer Motion
  - Floating toolbar (select, note, text, shape, pan) with tooltips
  - Notes have colored accents (orange, emerald)
  - Supports hashtags

#### **UI Primitives & Utilities**
- **DecisionBadge**: Colored badge for GO/EXPLORE/PARK/KILL decisions (reusable across app)
- **AxisScoreBar**: Score visualization for analysis axes
- **Button**: Custom button with variants (ghost, outline, primary)
- **Input, Textarea, Select**: Form elements
- **Popover, Dialog, Sheet, Tooltip**: Modal/dropdown components (Radix UI based)
- **K3rnLogo**: Brand logo component with hover animation

---

### DESIGN SYSTEM PATTERNS

**Color Palette**:
- Primary Brand: `#F75105` (orange)
- Dark Backgrounds: `#22242B`, `#2F323A`, `#1a1c22`, `#000` 
- Text: White primary, gray secondary, muted gray meta
- Decision Colors: Emerald (GO), Amber (EXPLORE), Gray (PARK), Red (KILL)

**Typography**:
- Light to bold weights for hierarchy
- Monospace for technical/code contexts
- Uppercase tracking-widest for labels

**Spacing**: 
- Consistent padding/margins (px-4, py-3, gap-4, etc.)
- Rounded corners: 24px (xl), 12px (lg), 8px (md)

**Effects**:
- Subtle: backdrop blur, glow shadows on interactive elements
- Animations: fade-in, slide-in, zoom-in, hover scales
- No heavy gradients or decorative blur (canonical design philosophy)

---

### FILE LOCATIONS
All pages are in `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/app/`
All components in `/Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/components/`
